About.title: Why
About.subtitle: Hot Wave?
About.desc: Based in the heart of Hurghada, Hot wave isn't just another tourism company. We are a family of ocean lovers and adventure seekers dedicated to showing you the authentic beauty of the Red Sea coast.
About.years_exp_desc: Crafting perfect memories for thousands of happy travelers.
About.f1_desc: Local professionals who know every hidden gem in the Red Sea and desert.
About.f2_desc: We prioritize your well-being with well-maintained equipment and protocols.
About.f3_desc: Intimate groups ensuring you get a personalized and uncrowded experience.
About.f4_desc: We capture the best moments so focused only on enjoying the ride.
